title: Marketing Executive @ Bedok ( F&B Industry / Vibrant Team / Career Exposure )
description:
Job Description:
We are looking for a passionate and creative Marketing Executive to join our team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for developing and executing digital marketing strategies to increase our online presence, engage our audience, and drive sales growth. If you have a knack for storytelling, a keen eye for design, and a deep understanding of digital trends, we want you on our team!

Key Responsibilities:

  • Develop, implement, and manage digital marketing campaigns across various channels, including social media, email, SEO, and paid advertising.
  • Create engaging and relevant content for social media platforms, website, and email newsletters.
  • Monitor and analyze the performance of digital marketing campaigns, providing insights and recommendations for improvement.
  • Manage the company's social media accounts, including content creation, scheduling, and community engagement.
  • Collaborate with the design team to create visually appealing graphics and videos.
  • Conduct market research to identify trends and opportunities for growth.
  • Stay updated with the latest digital marketing trends and best practices.
  • Coordinate with external vendors and agencies as needed.

Requirements:

  • Min Diploma in Marketing, Communications, or related field.
  • At least 1 year of relevant experience in marketing.
  • Proficient in using social media platforms (Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, etc.) and digital marketing tools
  • Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
  • Creative mindset with a strong attention to detail.
  • Ability to work independently and as part of a team.
  • Knowledge of graphic design software (Adobe Creative Suite, Canva) is a plus.

Interested applicants, you may either apply via here or sent an email at hr@harrianns.com.

At present, we do not require assistance from recruitment agencies. All applications should be submitted directly by candidates.

postedCompany.description:
HarriAnns is a Singapore-grown eatery with humble beginnings dating back to more than 60 years. It originated as a simple push-cart in the Tiong Bahru district in the early 1950s.

HarriAnns offers Peranakan heritage food made following recipes passed down for three generations from Grandma’s time. Till today, HarriAnns insists on using traditional methods and the freshest premium ingredients in the making of our Nonya Kueh. Each piece of Kueh is an edible piece of art, hand-crafted painstakingly by their chefs with tender loving care.

Through the decades, HarriAnns has become a name synonymous with good heritage food throughout Singapore. HarriAnns’ edible national treasures will change the way you think about Tradition and put Singapore heritage food on the culinary map of the world.
postedCompany.name: HARRIANN'S PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D16 Upper East Coast, Bedok, Eastwood, Kew Drive
